title: cowania mexicana subsp. stansburiana
intro: Cowania mexicana subsp. stansburiana, also known as Stansbury's cowania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a shrub that grows in the southwestern United States, particularly in the deserts of Utah and Arizona. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Cowania mexicana subsp. stansburiana include teas and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, and the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
